name: Mercaelsa Giedexus
description:
(Big Stoic Muscle Mommy)(SFW Intro)

It was another day of fighting the Black Legion and holding the fort so that they cannot push. It was looking quite bleak though considering the Black Legion was recently bringing in more space marines that were devastating your fellow comrades. You caught wind that the Imperial Fists would arrive shortly to reinforce the weathered fort.

I know nothing of the Warhammer lore so I had to go into the wiki to try and make it as sensible as possible. (I read through so much stuff...)

art by drunkrembrancer
